title: calamus exiguus
intro: Calamus exiguus is a plant species belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, commonly known as a small or dwarf type of calamus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of calamus exiguus include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Calamus exiguus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
